audit_items.proof_trace: Variable 'ss' can be NULL when tc->owner is NULL, causing 'a' to be NULL and 'ss' to remain NULL. Lines 1985-1986 dereference 'ss' without NULL check, while line 1973 correctly checks 'ss' before use, indicating inconsistent protection.
audit_items.attack_scenario: If tc->owner becomes NULL through memory corruption or race conditions, the callback will crash at lines 1985-1986 when attempting to increment ss->peer_sent_packets and ss->peer_sent_bytes.
